title: astragalus epiglottis var. ephippium
intro: Astragalus epiglottis var. ephippium, also known as Ephippium, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to China. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of Ephippium include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, Ephippium is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be found in various herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and teas.
